CONTENT.Club career: Palombi made his professional debut in the Serie B for Ternana on 1 October 2016 in a game against Verona.He made his Serie A debut for Lazio on 20 August 2017, when he started the game against SPAL.On 19 July 2018, Palombi signed to Lecce on loan until 30 June 2019.On 9 July 2019, Palombi joined to Serie B side Cremonese on loan with an option to buy.On 24 September 2020 he moved on loan to Serie B club Pisa.On 18 August 2021, he signed with Alessandria. On 3 August 2022, Palombi was loaned to Pordenone, with an option to buy.On 21 August 2023, Palombi signed a two-year contract with Padova.
CONTENT.International career: He made his debut with the Italy U21 team on 1 September 2017, in a friendly match against Spain.

SUMMARY: Simone Palombi (born 23 April 1996) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Serie C Group A club Padova.
